A clear, concise description of the problem.

> Library-specific issues (apron / bucket / wire / scaffold) belong in the
> library's own repo. See the [c3kit README](../../README.md) for repo links.

## Reproduction

Steps to reproduce, if applicable.

## Expected vs. actual

What you expected to happen, and what happened instead.
